title: Ordinance Approving the Supplemental Budget Amounting to Thirty-one Million One Hundred Eighty-five Thousand Five Hundred Eighty-seven Pesos and 01/100 (P 31,185,587.01) Chargeable Against the Savings From Current Personal Services and the Beginning Balance Cy 2020.
